title: Create Page
description: Scaffold a new page with a component, registry entry, and optional navigation config

name.description: The page name in kebab-case (e.g. blog-posts)
name.x-prompt: What is the name of the page? (kebab-case)

path.description: The URL path for this page (e.g. /blog or /blog/:id)
path.x-prompt: What is the URL path for this page? (e.g. /blog)

x-prompt.message: Which entry animation should this page use?
Which exit animation should this page use?
Which background color should this page use?
Foreground color override? (leave blank for none)

centered.description: Whether the page content should be centered
centered.x-prompt: Should the page content be centered?

isErrorPage.description: Whether this is an error page (excluded from navigation)

entrySpeed.description: Optional animation speed modifier for entry

x-prompt.message: Entry animation speed? (leave blank for default)

exitSpeed.description: Optional animation speed modifier for exit

x-prompt.message: Exit animation speed? (leave blank for default)

addNavigation.description: Whether to add a navigation entry for this page
addNavigation.x-prompt: Add this page to the navigation?

navLabel.description: Navigation label (required when addNavigation is true)
navLabel.x-prompt: What label should be used in the navigation?

navLocation.description: Where in the nav this page should appear

navAuthenticated.description: Only show in nav when the user is authenticated

navAnonymous.description: Only show in nav when the user is not authenticated

navDynamic.description: Whether the nav path must be resolved from the current user (e.g. /profile/:userId)

navDynamicField.description: User field used to resolve the dynamic nav path (e.g. _id)
